prompt: Export the Button component to Figma
expected_behavior: Checks for MCP availability, compiles Button.tsx via figma-dsl, exports JSON, and either pushes via MCP or provides plugin-ready JSON file.
validation: Approach selection is presented to user
Code Connect file path is referenced

prompt: Push all my components to our Figma design file
expected_behavior: Iterates over all components in preview/src/components/, compiles and exports each, then uses batch operations for import and comparison.

prompt: Set up Code Connect for my Hero component with Figma URL https://figma.com/design/abc123?node-id=1-2
expected_behavior: Updates Hero.figma.tsx with the provided Figma URL, replacing PLACEHOLDER. Verifies the mapping if MCP is available.
validation: Hero.figma.tsx FIGMA_URL updated with provided URL
PLACEHOLDER is no longer in the file
Props are properly mapped in the Code Connect binding
